node.text: John recently took a trip to Chicago and found the locals to be friendly.

node.text: Basketball has been a part of John's life since childhood, starting with watching NBA games with his dad and then playing in local leagues.

node.text: John believes in creating a positive environment and showing care for teammates to motivate them.
John has been playing professional basketball for just under a year.
